## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

## Component(s) Affected
- [ ] mobile-app (Android)
- [ ] backend-api (Laravel)
- [ ] Shared/API Interface
- [ ] Documentation/Other

## Related Issue
Closes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor or Architecture Update
- [ ] Documentation Update
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style and architectural guidelines of this project (MVVM for Mobile, MVC/API for Backend).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have removed unused imports, variables, and commented-out code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made following changes to the documentation (if applicable).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] The app (Mobile/Backend) builds and runs successfully on my local machine.
